texto: To keep the fire burning brightly there's one easy rule: Keep the two logs together near enough to keep each other warm and far enough apart - about a finger's breadth - for breathing room. Good fire good marriage same rule.
explicacao: Citação de Marnie Reed Crowell sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “To keep the fire burning brightly there's one easy rule: Keep the two logs together near enough t…” articula reflexao, companionship, enough em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como casamento e reflexao.
